content.title: Core Concepts

---

## Why This Architecture?

The radical uniformity of "everything is an item" enables:

- **One storage system** handles all data
- **One validation system** (type chain checking) applies everywhere
- **One rendering system** displays everything
- **Any item can link to any other** via `item://` URLs
- **Self-documentation**: the system describes itself using itself
